overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through an industrial solar farm in the Badlands. The player navigates around a building while approaching a large illuminated 'TECHNICA' billboard displaying a red number 2, surrounded by massive solar panel arrays.

agents.ego_description: driving forward along the paved road toward the illuminated billboard

entered.detail: large rounded concrete industrial building with horizontal ridges
extensive rows of solar panels angled toward the sky
extensive rows of solar panels angled toward the sky
massive digital billboard displaying red number 2 on white background with TECHNICA text above

segments.scene_description: Driving along a wide asphalt road through an industrial solar farm at night. Large cylindrical structures and extensive solar panel arrays line both sides of the road, while a massive illuminated billboard displaying a red '2' looms ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: solar farm perimeter near industrial buildings

events.description: vehicle initiates left turn to navigate around industrial building
vehicle turns right to return to main road facing the billboard

agents.ego_description: steering left around the building complex then turning right to reorient toward the billboard

entered.detail: large rectangular industrial building with bright interior lighting visible through windows
tall cylindrical water tank on metal supports

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns left to navigate around an illuminated warehouse building, passing the TECHNICA billboard on the right side. A water tower becomes visible on the right as the vehicle completes a right turn to face the billboard again.

agents.ego_description: driving straight toward the technica billboard on the main road

segments.scene_description: Continuing the approach toward the TECHNICA billboard on the straight main road. The billboard grows larger in the center of the frame while the water tower remains visible on the right, and the solar arrays extend into the distance on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a nighttime industrial solar farm that culminates in a direct approach toward a massive illuminated billboard. It begins on a wide asphalt road flanked by cylindrical structures and extensive solar panel arrays, with a glowing red number 2 visible in the far distance. As the vehicle turns left to navigate around an illuminated warehouse, the TECHNICA billboard shifts to the right side of the frame before a water tower emerges during a subsequent right turn. The scene then opens back onto the straight main road, where the camera advances steadily as the billboard grows larger in the center of the frame. Finally, the perspective centers on the towering sign while the solar arrays stretch endlessly into the dark horizon on both sides.
